root.title: EasyTripSaaS — AI itineraries for short trips
root.description: Plan weekends and short getaways with AI-powered itineraries, shared expenses and saved versions. Pick a language and start in minutes.

app.title: EasyTripSaaS Dashboard
app.description: Manage your itineraries, shared expenses and saved versions.

metadata.title: EasyTripSaaS — AI Itineraries for Weekends in Europe | Plan in 30 seconds
metadata.description: Plan short trips of 2–5 or more days with AI. Itineraries optimized for distances, local restaurants and hidden gems.
metadata.ogImageAlt: EasyTripSaaS — AI itineraries for short trips

hero.subtitle: AI creates a day-by-day plan, geographically optimized, with local restaurants and hidden gems. Time-bound access: day 2 unlocks on day 2.

signupCard.title: Create your first itinerary
signupCard.body: Sign up for free and jump straight into the dashboard — no waiting list.
signupCard.authFooter: After you sign in, use trip creation and the dashboard.

benefitsCard.title: What you get right away
benefitsCard.item1: AI itinerary generation for 2–5 or more days
benefitsCard.item2: Maps and routes optimized to minimize travel time
benefitsCard.footer: Cancellation: credit to use within a year.

heroAuth.subtitle: Resume an itinerary or create a new one: AI generation, day-by-day unlock, maps and regenerations just like in the reserved area.

dashboard.emptyBody: You don't have any itineraries yet. Use the form below to create one.
dashboard.title: Latest itineraries

features.title: You're not buying a product. You're buying an experience over time.
features.body: The expiration is the product itself: day 2 only unlocking on day 2 means users open the app every morning of their trip. That creates engagement no PDF can replicate.

box1.title: Progressive unlock
box1.body: Day 1 only shows day 1. Day 2 unlocks on day 2.

box2.title: Access ≠ File
box2.body: You're not buying a PDF. You're buying access to a dynamic system that knows where you are and what's happening today.

item1.title: AI itinerary generation
item1.body: Input: destination + dates + style. Output: a day-by-day plan unlocked progressively.

item2.title: Live maps
item2.body: Routes optimized to minimize travel. One click to open in Google Maps.

item3.title: PackedUp (group)
item3.body: Shared itinerary, in-app voting and built-in expense splitting.

features.footer: Regenerate: 3 free → 7 max → carousel. So you stop tweaking forever, pick the best itinerary and start enjoying your trip.

pricing.title: Simple pricing. Immediate value.
pricing.subtitle: Pay per trip or choose a subscription.

solo.name: Solo / Couple Trip
solo.cta: Sign up and create a trip →
solo.highlightFooter: 3 free → 7 max → carousel: regenerate without anxiety, within a clear limit.

group.name: Group Trip (3–5 people)
group.desc: TripGenius + PackedUp. A group that already splits the bill.
group.feature4: Every member sees the same unlock
group.cta: Create an account and organize the group →

frequent.name: Frequent traveler
frequent.feature3: Consistent with prices shown at checkout
frequent.feature4: LocalPass add-on: +€3.99 per city (insider, hidden gems)
frequent.cta: Sign up and explore the plans →

addon.title: Extra (Premium)
addon.body: Any plan + <accent>€3.99 add-on per city</accent> with LocalPass: places curated by local insiders, hidden gems and non-tourist tips.

faq.title: Quick answers, before you second-guess.
faq.subtitle: Cancellation: credit to use within a year. Content is meant to be experienced over time, not collected like files.

q1.q: How does the daily unlock work?
q1.a: Day 1 shows only day 1. Day 2 unlocks on day 2. Access expires at the end of the trip + 1 day (end_date + 1d).

q2.q: How long does it take to get the full plan?
q2.a: The itinerary is created in 30 seconds. The system uses different prompts for different moments: generation, live adaptation and slot replacement.

q3.q: How many times can I regenerate an itinerary?
q3.a: 3 free regenerations. Then 4–7 paid (€1.99). After the maximum: carousel (back to version 1, pick the best itinerary and start enjoying your trip).

q4.a: Generating the itinerary and live features need a connection. During the trip you can consult the unlocked plan, but generation/adaptation needs the network.

q5.q: How is LocalPass different from other travel platforms?
q5.a: LocalPass brings authentic content from local insiders: curated places, hidden gems and non-tourist tips. The goal is to avoid the places most tourists see on other platforms.

testimonials.title: The things you hear before buying.
testimonials.subtitle: Once you realize the plan isn't a static PDF but a system that adapts to your trip, you stop wasting time and start exploring.
testimonials.caption: Feedback from user research and travelers

t1.label: Frequent traveler
t1.quote: I lose 8 hours planning every trip. I just want to say where I'm going and get a plan that works.

t2.label: Group (3-5 friends)
t2.quote: Organizing a trip for five is harder than work: voting, expenses, who books what.

t3.label: LocalPass style
t3.quote: I often end up in tourist traps. I want to know where locals actually go.

cta.subtitle: The whole travel experience is designed to be lived day after day.
cta.bonus: Bonus: Invite a friend → 1 free trip.

footer.tagline: AI itineraries for short trips in Europe. Plan in 30 seconds.

privacyPage.marketingOptIn: I agree to receive marketing and onboarding emails from {appName}

privacyDelete.sectionBody: This action is permanent: we delete data in the database, Stripe relationships (if any), and the user in Clerk. You will not be able to recover the account.
privacyDelete.confirmMismatch: Type exactly «{phrase}» to confirm permanent deletion.
privacyDelete.successBody: Your account has been removed successfully. You will be signed out and redirected to the home page in a few seconds.

delete.cancelConfirmPaid:
Cancel «{destination}»?

The paid amount will be converted to EasyTrip credit (valid for 365 days) to use on your next trip.
delete.cancelTooltipPaid: Cancel the trip and receive EasyTrip credit
delete.cancelTooltipFree: Remove the trip from your list
delete.notCancellableTooltip: You cannot cancel a trip that has already started
delete.archiveConfirm:
Hide «{destination}» from the list?

The trip will be removed from your list. All data and payments remain stored in the system.{hint}
delete.archiveHint:
⚠️ Note: this action hides the trip but does NOT generate credits.
To cancel the trip and receive EasyTrip credits, use «Cancel trip» instead.
delete.archiveTooltip: Hides the trip from the list (no data is deleted)

postTrip.heroBody: Every trip leaves a mark. The places you discovered, the flavors you tasted, the moments you lived — they're all here, ready to be relived.
postTrip.expiryPrefix: Access to your itinerary expired on
postTrip.reactivateBody: Reactivate full access to your itinerary for 30 days. Relive every day, every restaurant, every hidden gem you discovered.
postTrip.newTripBody: You've already experienced the magic of a tailored itinerary. The next adventure awaits — with a <accent>20% discount</accent> just for you.
postTrip.footerNote: Your itinerary is safe. You can reactivate access at any time.
